title: ILIKE clauses don't work on certain characters
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id Int32, name String, description String);
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (1, 'hello', NULL), (2, 'hëllo', NULL), (3, 'hÄllo', NULL), (4, NULL, NULL);
CREATE TABLE related_table (test_id Int32, FOREIGN KEY (test_id) REFERENCES test_table(id));
SELECT name FROM test_table WHERE name LIKE '%ë%';
key_bug_features: ILIKE clause fails with specific special characters
